description_long: This doll features a stylized, chibi-like design with an oversized head and slender body. The hair is voluminous, dark brown, and intricately sculpted with large, sweeping locks that cover the ears and frame the face. The doll is dressed in a black, off-shoulder crop top with a ruffled edge, paired with high-waisted, tight-fitting black pants and long black gloves that reach above the elbows. The skin tone is fair, and the figure has pointed ears, suggesting an elf or fantasy-inspired character. The boots are knee-high and black, matching the overall dark, modern fantasy aesthetic. The surface appears smooth and slightly glossy, typical of collectible vinyl or plastic figures.
description: A stylized, fantasy-inspired doll with voluminous dark brown hair, pointed ears, and a black modern outfit with long gloves and boots.
description_view_0: The back view highlights the intricate hair sculpting and the ruffled edge of the crop top, with the pointed ears partially visible.
description_view_1: The left side view shows the profile of the face, the pointed ear, and the sleek fit of the clothing and boots.
description_view_2: The front view reveals the full outfit, pointed ears, and the doll's facial features and accessories.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, displaying the hair's volume and the side profile of the clothing and boots.
attribute_clothing_style: Modern fantasy-inspired attire with a black off-shoulder ruffled crop top, high-waisted tight black pants, long black gloves, and knee-high black boots. The style is reminiscent of urban fantasy or gothic fashion, with no visible patterns or logos.
attribute_pose: The doll stands upright with arms slightly bent and angled outward, hands relaxed at the sides, legs straight and close together, and head facing forward.
attribute_facial_expression: Neutral facial expression with relaxed mouth, open eyes, and no pronounced emotion.
attribute_hair_style: Large, voluminous dark brown hair styled in thick, sweeping locks that cover the ears and extend to the nape of the neck.
